schedule.type: Story 1 — Austrian GP Race Week Preview
Story 2 — Second angle on diffuser controversy

stories.title: Austrian GP: Diffuser Row Headlines Race Week at Red Bull Ring

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Austrian GP race week is here.

FP1: Tomorrow.
Qualifying: Saturday.
Race: Sunday 9 AM ET.

The FIA just banned Mercedes' diffuser.
Their freight is already en route to Austria.

This weekend is going to be wild. 🔥

#F1Fanrecap #AustrianGP #Formula1

article.headline: Austrian GP Preview: Diffuser Drama, Title Battle, and Verstappen's Possible Last Home Race

stories.title: FIA Bans Mercedes' Serrated Diffuser — Effective Austrian GP

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
FIA has banned Mercedes' serrated diffuser.

Effective: Austrian GP weekend.
Problem: Their freight is already en route.

Ferrari triggered the inquiry after Canada.
Ferrari also had their own alternative pre-approved.

Technical warfare. 🏎️

#F1Fanrecap #AustrianGP #MercedesF1

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
So Mercedes introduces a diffuser at Canada.
Ferrari protests it.
FIA bans it.
Ferrari already has a legal replacement ready.

Mercedes now faces a parts crisis with freight mid-journey.

The championship fight just moved to the rulebook. ⚖️

#F1Fanrecap #Formula1 #F1Tech

stories.title: Antonelli's Title Defense: 41-Point Lead, 15 Races Left

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
2026 F1 Championship standings:

Antonelli: 156 pts 🏆
Hamilton: 115 pts
Russell: 106 pts

41-point gap. 15 races left.
Hamilton needs +2.7 pts/race to close it.

But Antonelli has DNF'd from the lead twice.

Title is his to lose. 👀

#F1Fanrecap #Formula1 #KimiAntonelli

stories.title: Verstappen Exit Clause — Final Countdown Before Summer Break

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Verstappen is at Red Bull's home circuit this weekend.

He's P7. Exit clause triggers at summer break if not top-2.
He is 100+ points from P2.

It's mathematically impossible.

Austria might be his last race as a Red Bull driver.

#F1Fanrecap #Verstappen #AustrianGP

stories.title: Cadillac's Zero-to-Hero Plan: Biggest 2026 Upgrade Arrives in Austria

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
7 races into their F1 debut.
0 points.

Cadillac F1 bring their biggest 2026 upgrade to Austria this weekend.

Perez + Bottas. 500+ career race starts.
Their first F1 point would be historic.

Will the tire-cliff fix finally work? 🇺🇸

#F1Fanrecap #CadillacF1 #AustrianGP
